task_completion.description: Verify that the restricted support user has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user named 'support-user' in the Rancher Users & Authentication -> Users list.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the custom Cluster Role according to the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a role named 'Node Health Monitor' in the Rancher Roles -> Cluster Roles list.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the custom Project Role according to the specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a role named 'L1 App Viewer' in the Rancher Roles -> Project/Namespaces Roles list.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new isolated Rancher Project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a project named 'Support Access Project' in the Cluster -> Projects/Namespaces list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the support user is bound to the custom Cluster Role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'support-user' assigned to the 'Node Health Monitor' role in the Cluster Members screen or Role Bindings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the support user is bound to the custom Project Role within the new project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'support-user' assigned to the 'L1 App Viewer' role in the Project Members screen for the 'Support Access Project'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rancher web UI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Rancher web interface in a browser, rather than just terminal windows executing kubectl or curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rancher application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the browser address bar showing 'https://localhost' and the genuine Rancher dashboard.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply open the specification file without applying it.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual Rancher UI with the created resources, not just a text editor displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/support_rbac_spec.md'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a user named 'support-user'. The custom Cluster Role must be named 'Node Health Monitor'. The custom Project Role must be named 'L1 App Viewer'. The new project must be named 'Support Access Project'. The target namespace is 'production-apps'. The roles should strictly exclude 'secrets' and 'pods/exec' resources.
